16273 "[i:year:2012]"
16274 "recap"
16275 "The start of my photography. I had an Olympus XZ-1 and a bridge camera; both of which I loved and neither of which were really great cameras. I didn't take many pictures this year; a few cliche waterfall-but-slow-shutter pictures not fit for upload."
16273 16274 16275
16276 "[i:year:2013]"
16277 "I started to capture pictures of the interesting places I visited. It's also the first year I took a passable photo."
16276 16274 16277
16278 "[i:year:2015]"
16278 16274 31
16279 "[i:year:2016]"
16280 "A big year for me. I started travelling; while sitting in a cafe in Amsterdam a pride parade passed by. Not long afterwards I came out as transgender. I also started taking wildlife photos, a niche I've preferred since then."
16279 16274 16280
16281 "[i:year:2017]"
16282 "Lots of travel, especially around Ireland."
16281 16274 16282
16283 "[i:year:2018]"
16284 "In 2018 I left Europe for the first time, though I have to admit I find America is much pleasant (visually) outside its major cities."
16283 16274 16284
16285 "[i:year:2019]"
16286 "I was indoors for most of 2019, as was everyone else."
16285 16274 16286
16287 "[i:year:2020]"
16288 "Another pandemic year. I did get outside, occassionally, to take some wildlife photos."
16287 16274 16288
16289 "[i:year:2021]"
16290 "I re-visited America, to the mid-west. Chicago was monumental; as someone used to smaller European cities the _extent_ of the city was jaw-dropping. Despite my pre-conceptions, the biodiversity in the US is impressive; birds of prey, sandhill cranes, hummingbirds and woodpeckers were common. Wildlife was more present than in the parts of Europe i was used to."
16289 16274 16290
16291 "[i:year:2022]"
16292 "A big year for travel. I visited London (possibly my favourite city, it's impossible to be bored there), and saw more the rural parts of Wisconsin. The visit to the International Crane Foundation was a highlight; they're really charming birds"
16291 16274 16292
16293 "[i:year:2023]"
16294 "Berlin was a ghost-town when I visited, in the best way. The city was snowed under; I missed virtually every noteworthy sight (the museum's, Aleksanderplatz, dozens other), but I had a good time traipsing around in the snow and visiting Christmas markets."
16293 16274 16294
16295 "[i:year:2024]"
16296 "I saw some of the most beautiful sights on earth this year. I'm really fond of moorish architecture & islamic tilework; Granada, Seville, and Córdoba were jaw-dropping places."
16295 16274 16296
16297 "[i:year:2025]"
16298 "A varied year; I saw the old castle in Conwy, Slovenia, a run across Iberia (seeing more moorish architecture), and the rainforests of Anaga in Tenerife."
16297 16274 16298
